latent_vars.mechanism: Motor vehicle collision with multi-site soft tissue injury complaints.

mechanism: Motor vehicle collision with multi-site soft tissue injury complaints.
chief_complaint: Neck, back, and generalized pain after the incident.
diagnosis: Soft tissue strain after motor vehicle collision.
imaging_impression: No acute osseous abnormality. Correlate with ongoing symptoms.
objective_finding: Pain-limited range of motion with paraspinal tenderness documented on examination.
disposition: Discharged home with conservative care instructions and outpatient follow-up.
treatment_plan: Continue home exercises, medication review, and outpatient reassessment.
billing_lines: DOS 01/18/2024 | CPT/HCPCS 99283 | Revenue Code 0450 | Units 1 | Charge Amount $920.00 | Emergency department evaluation
DOS 01/25/2024 | CPT/HCPCS 99213 | Revenue Code 0510 | Units 1 | Charge Amount $245.00 | Office follow-up

template_context.chief_complaint: Neck, back, and generalized pain after the incident.
template_context.mechanism: Motor vehicle collision with multi-site soft tissue injury complaints.
template_context.medications:
1. Lisinopril 10 mg PO daily
2. Metformin 500 mg PO BID
template_context.treatment_plan: Continue home exercises, medication review, and outpatient reassessment.
template_context.follow_up_reason: Follow-up for persistent pain, mobility loss, and treatment response.
template_context.functional_limitation_text: Ongoing limitations with lifting, overhead activity, sleep, and household tasks were reported.

template_context.pt_response_text: Mild increase in symptoms with overhead activity but overall tolerance improved.
